overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic Western video game showing a character walking through a rainy night in an Old West town. The character traverses muddy, gas-lit streets lined with wooden buildings, passing a horse and approaching a saloon before turning down a narrow alley.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between wooden fence and building

events.description: passing a warm wall lantern and campfire brazier on the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow muddy alleyway past a wooden fence and cart

entered.detail: tall wooden plank fence running along the left side of the alley
lit oil lantern mounted on the building wall casting warm yellow light
old wooden wagon wheel and cart abandoned against the fence
metal brazier with glowing embers sitting on the ground near the building
tall wooden post with a lit lamp at the top illuminating the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow enclosed alleyway at night in heavy rain. A wooden fence lines the left side with a wall-mounted lantern and abandoned cart nearby. The character passes a glowing campfire brazier as they approach a street lamp in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of western town with wooden storefronts

events.description: passing a dark horse tied to a wooden post on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking down the main muddy street passing wooden buildings on the right

notable_agents.action: dark horse standing still, tied to a wooden hitching post

entered.detail: row of single-story wooden western storefronts with porches
large two-story wooden building with balcony visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wider main street lined with wooden buildings on the right. The character walks past a horse tied to a post on the left. The wet cobblestone street reflects the warm glow of gas lamps as a large two-story building becomes visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: saloon district with two-story wooden buildings and porch gatherings

events.description: approaching a saloon with people gathered on the front porch

agents.ego_description: approaching a two-story saloon with people visible on the balcony and porch

notable_agents.action: group of people gathered on the saloon porch, some sitting in chairs near the entrance

entered.detail: large two-story wooden saloon with illuminated windows and balcony
wooden second-floor balcony with railings overlooking the street
covered front porch with steps leading up to the saloon entrance

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a prominent two-story saloon on the right with warm light spilling from its windows. Several people stand and sit on the saloon porch, creating the first signs of life in the rainy town. The horse previously passed is now behind as the character walks alongside the large wooden building.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow side street with brick building and no entry sign

events.description: character turns left down a narrower side street away from the saloon
passing close to a brick wall on the left that temporarily fills the frame

agents.ego_description: turning left down a narrow side street with a brick building marked No Entry

entered.detail: red brick building with arched doorway and weathered facade
painted sign on the brick wall reading No Entry in white letters
stack of wooden barrels and crates against the brick wall

segments.scene_description: The character turns left down a narrow side street, leaving the saloon behind. A brick building on the left features a prominent No Entry sign and wooden barrels stacked against its wall. The street becomes more enclosed as the character continues through the rainy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic, rainy alleyway into a bustling town center before retreating back into a narrow side street. It begins in a dark, enclosed passage where the character passes a wooden fence and a glowing campfire brazier under the heavy downpour. As the path opens, the scene expands into a wider main street of wet cobblestones that reflect the warm glow of gas lamps, leading the character past a tethered horse toward a large two-story building. The movement continues alongside a prominent saloon where warm light spills from the windows and people gather on the porch, providing a brief moment of activity in the rainy night. Finally, the camera turns left away from the saloon and into a tighter side street, passing a brick building with a No Entry sign and stacked wooden barrels as the environment becomes enclosed once more.
